title: potentilla × intermedia
intro: Potentilla × intermedia, also known as silver cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is a cross between Potentilla nitida and Potentilla argentea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla × intermedia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
